context: BERT is a pre trained language model
llmResponse: BERT uses bidirectional transformers for natural language understanding
GPT models generate text by predicting tokens sequentially
Embeddings convert words and phrases into numerical vectors
Attention mechanisms allow models to focus on relevant parts of input

context: Sequence to sequence maps input to output sequences
llmResponse: Seq2seq models convert one sequence to another using encoder decoder
Tokenization breaks text into meaningful units for processing
Stemming removes suffixes to find word stems

context: Lemmatization reduces words to base forms
llmResponse: Lemmatization converts words to canonical forms
Part of speech tagging labels words as nouns verbs adjectives etc
Named entity recognition extracts names of people places and organizations
Sentiment analysis determines if text is positive negative or neutral
Topic modeling identifies themes in text collections
Text summarization creates brief summaries of longer texts
Machine translation uses models to translate text between languages

context: Question answering finds answers to queries
llmResponse: Question answering systems locate answers in documents
Information extraction identifies and extracts specific information from text
Relation extraction finds connections between entities in text
Coreference resolution identifies which pronouns refer to which entities
Word sense disambiguation identifies which meaning applies in context
Paraphrase detection recognizes when sentences convey the same meaning
Semantic similarity quantifies how similar texts are in meaning

context: Text classification assigns categories to documents
llmResponse: Text classification predicts category labels for text documents
Intent recognition determines what users want to accomplish
Dialogue systems manage multi turn conversations with users
Semantic parsing converts text to formal logical representations
Dependency parsing identifies grammatical relationships in sentences
Constituency parsing identifies phrase structure in text
Word alignment identifies correspondences between words in translation
Discourse analysis examines how meaning is created across texts
Pragmatics examines how context affects meaning in language
